actions.intent: Open the lower rescue route and break the left crate near the most threatened puppy.
Break the lower right route tax and bring the first priority to one-clear-away.
Make a controlled top-side pivot without making the safe puppy first.
Extract the lower puppy and clear the dock residue created by the opening route.
Commit to the middle puppy as the second priority instead of drifting into top cleanup.
Open one side of the safe top target while cashing a planned dock recovery.
Break the right-side ice support during the controlled pivot.
Take the lower-side dock recovery before the final top extraction setup.
Bring the top target to one-clear-away after the lower and middle rescues are secured.
Finish the safe top puppy after the capstone order is proven.

notes: Designer golden for the capstone: lower water priority first, one planned dock recovery, middle pivot second, top target last.
